channel.title: Forest SD Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on technology, SEO, digital marketing, and life as a digital native in San Diego.

item.title: Any Lawful Use Is Not an AI Safety Policy
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: Google's reported Pentagon AI deal says its models can be used for 'any lawful government purpose.' That phrase should worry anyone pretending legality is the same thing as restraint.

item.title: The Most Important AI Release This Week Was a Postmortem
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: OpenAI launched GPT-5.5. Anthropic published a blunt postmortem explaining why Claude got worse. The postmortem matters more, because trust beats benchmark theater.

item.title: Apple Just Picked Hardware Over AI Hype
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: Tim Cook's move to executive chairman and John Ternus taking over as CEO is not routine succession news. Apple just told the market that hardware still matters more than AI theater.

item.title: Claude Design Means the Mockup Layer Is Officially Cheap
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: Anthropic's new design product turns prototypes, decks, and marketing mockups into promptable output. The real shift is that draft-layer design just got a lot cheaper.

item.title: Topical AEO and SEO in 2026: What Actually Wins Now
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: A practical guide to topical AEO and SEO in 2026, including AI Overviews, entity signals, topical authority, structured content, and what marketers should do next.

item.title: AEO: How to Optimize for AI Search Engines
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: AI Engine Optimization explained. How to get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Content structure, source selection, and actionable tactics for 2026.

item.title: Entity SEO: The Complete Guide for 2026
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: Everything you need to know about entity SEO in 2026. Knowledge Graph optimization, JSON-LD structured data, entity-query overlap, and practical steps for local businesses.

item.title: Content Strategy for Small Businesses That Actually Drives Revenue
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: Why most small business blogs fail and what to do instead. Hub-and-spoke content, topical authority, local content strategies, and how to measure content ROI beyond traffic.

item.title: The State of Web Development in 2026: What's Changed
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: Static sites are back, AI writes code now, and performance is everything. A developer's honest take on web development in 2026.

item.title: Why San Diego's Tech Scene Is Quietly Exploding
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: San Diego's tech ecosystem is booming — biotech, defense tech, AI startups, and a digital scene that rivals bigger cities. A local perspective on why SD is the place to watch.

item.title: The State of Local SEO in 2026: What Actually Works
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: A practical look at what's actually moving the needle in local search — from entity optimization and AI Overviews to GBP strategies and schema markup.

item.title: How Digital Natives Are Redefining Creativity in the AI Era
item.author: forestsd2026@gmail.com (Forest SD)
item.description: How growing up with AI as a native tool is changing the creative process — from content creation and design to marketing and beyond.
